note: Gemini Earn redemption performance depended on Genesis as the lending counterparty.
Genesis could not meet Earn customer redemptions within the expected service-level window.
Gemini had to distinguish Earn from other Gemini products and services after the redemption halt.
Customer recovery became dependent on Genesis bankruptcy proceedings and creditor outcomes.
Earn users faced a long update and recovery process after redemptions were frozen.
Market health should track actual customer access and distribution status rather than only announcements.
